meaning: n.肉桂塑料(一种抗蚀性聚苯乙烯塑料)
examples: Styron also wrote Sophie's Choice, popularized by a movie starring Meryl Streep and Kevin Kline.
Sophie's choice is one of the greatest novels written by William Styron, a famous American novelist in the 20th century.
With Kathleen Turner, Jill Clayburgh, and cameos by William Styron, Arthur Penn, and other eminences.
Black activists argued that Styron had no place appropriating black history.
The outcry from African-American novelists was so intense that a collection of essays, "William Styron's Nat Turner: Ten Black Writers Respond" was published a year later.
